ist eine auf niedergelassene Ärztinnen u: is a digital agency specialised in resident physicians in Austria and Germany. Operated by Kevin Hofbauer e.U. based in Lower Austria. Ja – jeder niedergelassene Arzt ist ein: Yes – every resident physician is an independent business and can apply for funding individually. For a medical centre with 10 doctors, that's up to € 60,000 in total funding.
Ja – und zwar unabhängig davon, ob Sie W: Yes – regardless of whether you are a private-pay or statutory-contract physician.

Ja. KMU.DIGITAL fördert sowohl die Neuer: Yes. KMU.DIGITAL funds both the creation and the relaunch of a website, provided it represents a significant improvement.
Ja. Niedergelassene Ärzte sind als Einze: Yes. Resident physicians are eligible as sole traders. KMU.DIGITAL reimburses 30% of investment costs, up to € 6,000 per business.
Ja. Schema Markup verbessert die Darstel: Yes. Schema Markup improves how you appear in Google search results (rich snippets: star ratings, opening hours, FAQ excerpts) and is at the same time the foundation for AI visibility.
Ja. Transparente Preisangaben sind erlau: Yes. Transparent pricing is allowed and even advisable. Make sure the prices are current and that no misleading "from" prices are used.
Ja. Wir begleiten unsere Kunden durch de: Yes. We guide our clients through the KMU.DIGITAL process, help with selecting a consultant, and ensure that the quote and invoicing comply with the funding rules.

Kein anderer auf Arztpraxen spezialisier: No other provider specialised in medical practices in Austria does this.
Kein Auftrag. Kein Risiko. Kevin meldet: No commitment. No risk. Kevin will contact you personally.
Kein individuelles Design: Standardtempl: No individual design: standard templates, often with the software provider's logo.
Kein SEO: Keine Kontrolle über Meta-Tags: No SEO: no control over meta tags, URL structure, or Schema Markup.
Keine Aufzeichnung von Gesprächen ohne a: No recording of conversations without explicit consent.
Keine Differenzierung. Auf DocFinder seh: No differentiation. On DocFinder, all doctors look the same. On your own website, you can present your specialisation, your philosophy, and your services in a way that fits you.
Keine Fernbehandlung ohne Erstordination: No remote treatment without an initial in-person visit.
Keine Gesundheitsdaten im Kontaktformula: Don't ask for health data in the contact form. Don't ask about symptoms, diagnoses, or medications. Name, email, phone, and a general request field are sufficient.
Keine Heilversprechen. Aussagen wie „Wir: No promises of a cure. Statements like "We cure your back pain" are forbidden. Factual descriptions of the services and treatment methods offered are permitted.
Keine KI-Readiness: Kein llms.txt, keine: No AI readiness: no llms.txt, no structured data for AI systems.
Keine marktschreierische Werbung. Der To: No hard-sell advertising. The tone must be factual and informative. Aggressive sales rhetoric, countdown timers, or discount campaigns contradict professional conduct rules.
Keine medizinischen Daten im Klartext sp: Do not store medical data in plain text – appointment requests and prescription requests should be transmitted encrypted to the practice.
Keine Patientenfotos ohne schriftliche E: No patient photos without written consent.
Keine Statusanalyse machen. Die Statusan: Not doing a status analysis. The status analysis is a prerequisite for the implementation funding. Without step 1, no step 2.
Keine vergleichende Werbung. Sie dürfen: No comparative advertising. You may not claim to be better than other doctors. Phrases like "the best dermatology practice in Wien" or "leading specialist" are not permitted.
Keiner dieser Stile trifft es genau?: None of these styles fit exactly?
